About Us

Kalgate is a highly reputable organization, known for its reliable and dependable services.

We drive businesses by providing professional and working Business Development Consulting for Firms.

Kalgate is deliberate about her ingenuity of fusing technology into Logistics and Haulage Services.
We are deliberate in attaining excellent sustainable financial performance.

  • Transport Logistics Company
  • Haulages various goods and services across the globe
  • Truck hire and leasing
  • Truck maintenance
  • Drivers training and outsourcing
  • Transport Advisory and Consulting Services
